reviews.review_title: Low Price but Great offroad driving XP
reviews.review_description: Picked up this offroad truck game because it was cheap, and wow… I’m blown away!. The truck driving feels so realistic, from climbing hills to handling rough offroad trails, it’s pure fun. The controls are super responsive, and the truck physics make every challenge exciting. Honestly, for such a low price, this game is a total gem. Huge respect to the devs for delivering a high-quality offroad truck driving experience at such a bargain! 👏❤️

There's nothing realistic about this game. I'd love a refund considering I literally just purchased the game. I see it says subscription for this. I hope to goodness I don't have to pay on this game again

developer_response.body:
Hi FierySphynx4882, thanks for sharing your concerns.
We’re sorry to hear that the game didn’t meet your expectations and caused frustration. We understand how disappointing that can feel, especially right after a purchase.

We want to clarify that any purchases or subscriptions are fully handled by the platform’s store system, and refunds are managed directly through their official support channels. We don’t charge users again outside of what the store clearly shows and authorizes.

That said, the game is actively being improved, with ongoing updates focused on realism, gameplay depth, and overall polish. If you decide to try a newer version in the future, we hope it offers a better experience.

Thank you for your time and feedback.
— Gamotronix Studio 🏁

reviews.review_description:
just purchased this game cos its cheap and not losing much if its crap and I Am BLOWn AWaY....Wow. wasnt expecting it to be this good. thecontrols are seriously responsive. pls gamers, buythis game now. After some updates, i will give it 7 stars......This game does not desearve to be this cheap,and i thank the Devs fortheir efforts and kindness👏👏👏👏👏👏❤️......
just a wee bit of updates especiallythe hands gripping the control(wheels)

developer_response.body: Wow, your review truly made our day! 🙌 We’re so happy you’re enjoying the game and especially loving the responsive controls. Thank you for recognizing the effort we’ve put in, it means a lot! ❤️ We hear you on the hands gripping the wheel suggestion, and we’ll definitely keep that in mind for upcoming updates. 🚗💨 Your support keeps us motivated to keep improving!

reviews.review_description: Totally worth the small price. Lots of fun challenges. Kid friendly too.
